# update()

**Instance Method**

Tells the authorization plug-in to get and display the appropriate view in the authorization plug-in’s user interface.

## Declaration

```swift
func update()
```

## Discussion

Your subclass of [doc://com.apple.securityinterface/documentation/SecurityInterface/SFAuthorizationPluginView] should call this method when a user clicks a button in your view that should result in a new view being displayed. Calling this method causes the authorization plug-in to get the new view and display it.

## Communicating with the Authorization Plug-in

- **display()**: Displays the user interface provided by the authorization plug-in view subclass.
- **setButton(_:enabled:)**: Enables or disables a button in the authorization plug-in’s user interface.
